# ai-first-scraper

> Ad-free Markdown extraction API for LLM and AI agent consumption. Fetches any URL or PDF, strips ads / nav / scripts / trackers, returns clean Markdown.

Public instance: https://ai-first-scraper.onrender.com

## Endpoints
- `GET  /scrape?url=<url>[&max_tokens=N]` — JSON `{url, title, word_count, markdown, links, truncated, content_type}`.
- `GET  /raw?url=<url>[&max_tokens=N]` — `text/markdown` only.
- `POST /batch` body `{"urls": [...up to 25...], "max_tokens": N?}` — array of per-URL results, parallel fetch.
- `GET  /openapi.json` — full machine-readable OpenAPI spec.
- `GET  /llms.txt` — this file, served live.
- `GET  /.well-known/ai-plugin.json` — ChatGPT plugin manifest for agent discovery.

## How an AI agent should use this
1. Decide which URL you need to read.
2. `GET https://ai-first-scraper.onrender.com/raw?url=<encoded-url>` (or `/scrape` for JSON envelope with metadata).
3. Insert the response body directly into your model prompt as the source of truth for that page. No further HTML parsing required.

## Limits
- Up to 25 URLs per batch.
- 10 MB upstream cap, 15s per-URL timeout.
- `max_tokens` is a soft cap on whitespace-split tokens.

## Tool definition (OpenAI / Anthropic function-calling style)
```json
{
  "name": "fetch_page_as_markdown",
  "description": "Fetch a web page and return its main content as clean Markdown, with ads and navigation removed.",
  "parameters": {
    "type": "object",
    "properties": {
      "url": {"type": "string"},
      "max_tokens": {"type": "integer"}
    },
    "required": ["url"]
  }
}
```
Map to `GET /raw?url=<url>&max_tokens=<max_tokens>`.

## Install (companion MCP server)
```
uvx ai-first-scraper-mcp
```
Gives Claude Desktop / Cursor / Cline three tools: `fetch_page`, `fetch_pages_batch`, `search_web`.

## Related
- https://github.com/yubinkim444/ai-first-search — search + scrape pipeline.
- https://github.com/yubinkim444/ai-first-scraper-mcp — MCP wrapper.
